metadata.label: same/Microsoft
metadata.title: Software Engineer II - Azure Storage
metadata.team_direction: Microsoft is building a massively scalable cloud storage solution, Azure Storage, and is looking for a Software Engineer II to join their team

official_notes: Old report baseline only; no detailed official target revision priority was recorded.
Old report assessment: official reviewer likely underweighted top-of-page senior/backend framing risk.
claude_notes: High severity on Summary header: Strategic Problem Solving.
Medium severity on transition framing: transitioning from data analytics.
Medium severity on exact top-of-page keyword signaling: Distributed Systems and Code Review.
Medium severity on category naming: Cloud.

revision_priority: 在 `## Skills` 里补上 `Distributed Systems`，并在 Summary 或 TikTok 至少一条 bullet 里保留同义的分布式服务证据。
收紧加粗规则：去掉限定词加粗，修正 `**2 release** cycles` 这类断裂写法，只保留技术名词和数字加粗。

findings.issue: Opening framing leads with a transition story ('transitioning from data analytics to backend engineering') before the backend/distributed-systems signal, which weakens the first-read positioning.
findings.fix: Rewrite the first sentence to open with the target role and domain, e.g. 'Backend engineer building distributed systems...', and move the transition narrative later if you keep it at all.

findings.issue: The resume presents Python, Java, C#, C++, JavaScript, Go, SQL, and multiple cloud/data tools as if they are all primary stacks. That breadth reads as stack stuffing unless the hierarchy is tightened.
findings.fix: Keep C++ and the 2-3 most role-relevant supporting technologies in the headline sections; push the rest into the specific bullets where they are actually used.

findings.issue: The latest/relevant section is dominated by percentage/time improvements, with no clear service scale or throughput anchor, so the impact reads smaller than a Microsoft backend role usually expects.
findings.fix: Add one concrete tier-1 scope metric where true: alerts/day, reviewer volume, request rate, latency/SLA, or service size. If unavailable, tighten the wording to show ownership boundary more explicitly.

revision_priority: [MUST] Rewrite the first Summary sentence to lead with backend/distributed-systems positioning, not the transition story.
[MUST] Narrow the headline stack claim so the resume does not read as 6+ languages of primary expertise.
[SHOULD] Add a tier-1 scope/scale metric to the TikTok section.
[NICE] Keep the rest of the experience bullets as proof points; do not touch immutable titles, dates, or locations.
